title: email uploaded files directly from a  cell on monday.
excerpt:
Description
it would be nice to directly email a uploaded file directly out of monday vs downloading first. 
What are you trying to achieve
to be more efficent and avoid additional download files.

posts.author: Tredfr (Tred Rowland)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

it would be nice to directly email a uploaded file directly out of monday vs downloading first.

What are you trying to achieve

to be more efficent and avoid additional download files.

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

This is actually possible with automations. I literally just built it out today.

In my example, I used the trigger: “when column changes” and I selected the Files column.

Automation:

The selected portion is the Files column.

Screenshot 2025-08-25 at 19.49.061137×546 33.2 KB

Result:

You click on the selected portion and it downloads the file onto the computer.

Screenshot 2025-08-25 at 19.49.381510×490 25.1 KB

Let me know if you have any questions.
